notes: Cross-platform Rust file-watcher that runs a command on file changes (alternative to entr/nodemon). Name = "watch" + "exec" (execute). The "exec" suffix follows dev-tooling convention (cf. the exec syscall / shell builtin): "eg-ZEK", not "ex-eck". STRESS: WOTCH-eg-zek (primary on first syllable, secondary on -ZEK). No official creator pronunciation FAQ exists, but the compound is unambiguous.
